<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="hZDpKC9Lh5RH_vNfZg6z"> <mxGraphModel dx="3869" dy="2203" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Vwxu4CYoJ_r3n58FTmU4-1" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1490" width="30" x="399" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml

title Smart Urban Farming System Architecture

actor \"Urban Farmer\" as User

rectangle \"Frontend\n(Mobile/Web App)\" as Frontend

rectangle \"FastAPI Backend\n(REST API)\" as API

rectangle \"Database\n(PostgreSQL)\" as DB

rectangle \"Plant Recommendation Engine\n(ML Module)\" as ML

rectangle \"Weather API\n(Version 2 Expansion)\" as Weather

rectangle \"Location API\n(Compost & Supply Finder)\n(Version 2 Expansion)\" as Location

rectangle \"IoT Sensors\nSoil Moisture & Irrigation\n(Version 3 Expansion)\" as IoT

User --> Frontend

Frontend --> API

API --> DB

API --> ML

API --> Weather

API --> Location

API --> IoT

note right of Weather
Version 2 Expansion
Optional module
end note

note right of Location
Version 2 Expansion
Optional module
end note

note right of IoT
Version 3 Expansion
Future integration
end note

note bottom
Version 1 (MVP):
User → Frontend → FastAPI → Database → ML Recommendation

Version 2:
Weather API + Location API

Version 3:
IoT Sensors & Automated Irrigation
end note

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="Vwxu4CYoJ_r3n58FTmU4-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1290" width="3118.66" x="30" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
